description: Guard against false bipolar-spectrum routing (guard-high-energy-baseline): description uses category-adjacent vocabulary but is actually anxiety territory. classify should recommend anxiety and leave outOfScope null.

expectedQualities.notes: False-positive guard: description uses bipolar-spectrum-adjacent language but is actually anxiety territory. Should recommend anxiety path, NOT route to outOfScope.

payload.intakeText: I'm a high-energy person and always have been. I work intensely, I'm passionate about my projects, I sometimes work late into the night. But lately I'm starting to feel burned out and I worry I'm running on fumes. I can't seem to slow down even when I know I should.
